title: Metabolism
description: Temperature, Health, Thirst, Hunger as a cohesive, interconnected system
body:
# **METABOLISM**

Made for 2023 MMD Winterjam

My Discord Server : [https://discord.gg/H4nvbNF](https://discord.gg/H4nvbNF)

## **A total revamp of how Minecraft hunger works!**

- **Exploration** can make you **Hot or Cold**!
- Being **Hot** makes you **Thirsty**!
- Being **Cold** makes you **Hungry**!
- Both will make it harder to regenerate **Health**
- **Build** shelters and equipment to combat Heat!

- Gain **Food & Hydration** from food items!
- **Metabolize** food & hydration to gain **Warmth**!
- Get **Warmth** to regenerate **Health**!
- Create a **Balanced Diet** according to your **Activities**!

- **Exploration** becomes more **Challenging**!
- **Food** becomes more **Rewarding and Complex!**
- Does not **Punish** you for playing the game
    (mining, moving, combat gives warmth, instead of hunger or thirst!)

## **COMPATIBILITY**

- Pagan's Blessing
- Create

## Notes

#### All effects, metabolite(food) data, and resistances are configurable using datapacks!
#### [View the wiki!](https://github.com/lilypuree/Metabolism/wiki)
#### Suggestions for mod compatibility / new features are welcome!
